post.shiki-demo.description.zh: Shiki 按需加载语法高亮与 JSON 诊断示例

post.shiki-demo.excerpt.zh: Shiki 按需加载、语言标签与图标、JSON 波浪线诊断、自定义浮层提示（非浏览器原生 title）。

post.shiki-demo.fence.3.zh:
def fibonacci(n: int) -> list[int]:
    a, b = 0, 1
    result = []
    for _ in range(n):
        result.append(a)
        a, b = b, a + b
    return result

print(fibonacci(10))

npm install shiki
npm run build
git push origin main
